response.reasoning: The role requires a director-level IC with 15+ years of experience, deep AI expertise, and a demonstrated track record advising strategic customers on cloud/AI adoption. Step 1 — experience quantity: the candidate's career spans ~20 years (2006–present), clearing the 15-year bar. Step 2 — AI depth: AI work appears only in the most recent role at re:cinq (April 2025–present), focused on MCP tooling and agentic workflows. No prior roles show meaningful AI/ML product ownership or platform building. Step 3 — seniority/strategic posture: the career is consistently hands-on IC (Senior/Staff engineer), with no evidence of director-level scope, customer advisory work, or shaping organizational AI strategy. Step 4 — education: MIT BS in CS is a genuine strength; however, no Master's or PhD in an AI-related field, which is a preferred qualifier. Step 5 — entrepreneurial signal: GISCollective (founded 2016, ongoing) shows initiative, but it is an open-source geo-data project with limited AI relevance. Step 6 — cloud fluency: AWS CDK and Kubernetes appear, but cloud architecture is not a central theme across the career. Overall, the candidate is a strong generalist engineer with very recent AI exposure, but lacks the depth, seniority, and strategic advisory experience the role demands.
strengths: 20-year career spanning web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure engineering — comfortably clears the experience threshold
MIT BS in Computer Science combined with active open-source authorship (Fluent-Asserts, Trial, GISCollective) signals genuine technical depth
Hands-on AI/MCP agentic tooling work at re:cinq demonstrates recent, relevant pivot toward AI infrastructure
concerns: AI expertise is confined to ~1 year at re:cinq; no track record of building AI-powered products or platforms at scale prior to 2025
No director-level scope, thought leadership, or strategic customer advisory experience visible anywhere in the career history
No advanced degree (Master's/PhD) in AI or a related field, and no published research or recognized external AI expertise
response.justification: Bogdan is a credible senior-to-staff engineer with genuine breadth, but the role is explicitly a director-level AI strategy position requiring recognized expertise, customer advisory experience, and a long track record of AI product or platform ownership — none of which the résumé demonstrates. The AI work is real but nascent, and the career trajectory points firmly toward hands-on craft rather than strategic leadership.
